string-array.name: icebreakers
string-array.item: What made you sign up for this app?
What is the weirdest thing you have done recently?
If you could travel anywhere tomorrow, where would you go?
What is your favorite place you have ever been to?
Is there a place you dream of visiting but have never been to?
Do you prefer the mountains or the sea? Why?
If you could live in another historical era, which would you choose?
What is the best thing that happened to you this year?
If you were an animal, which one would you be?
What is on your bucket list right now?
Do you have a long-time hobby? Tell me about it!
Is there something you have always wanted to learn but never started?
What kind of music have you been listening to lately?
Do you play any instrument or have you ever tried?
Do you read books? What is the last one you read?
TV series or movies? Do you have any recommendations?
Do you like cooking? Do you have a signature dish?
Are you more of a museum day or an outdoor day person?
Do you do sports? For how long?
Are you a morning person or a night owl?
What relaxes you the most after a stressful day?
What is a small thing that makes you happy every day?
If you could give advice to your past self, what would it be?
Is there something about you that people often misunderstand?
What is the nicest compliment you have ever received?
What do you value most in a friendship?
Are you more extroverted or introverted? Do you recognize yourself in something?
What is your guilty pleasure (series, food, music...)?
If your life were a movie, what genre would it be?
What would you do if you won the lottery?
What is the most embarrassing thing that has happened to you?
If you could have dinner with a famous person (alive or dead), who would it be?
Do you have a hidden talent?
What superpower would you want and why?
Do you prefer a night in or a night out?
If you had to describe yourself in three words, what would they be?
What is in your bag/pocket right now?
Is there anything about neurodivergence you would like to explain better to others?
Is there a quirky trait of yours that you have learned to appreciate?
Have you ever been misunderstood because of who you are?
What helps you recharge your social battery?
Do you have a ritual that helps you focus?
Do you like talking about your passions or do you prefer to keep them to yourself?
Have you ever met someone with your same specific interests?
